# Pull request

## What and why
<!-- Two or three sentences. -->

## PRD / ADR references
<!-- Cite section numbers, e.g., PRD §14.7, ADR-0003. -->

## Plan checklist item
<!-- Link to the docs/plan/*.md item this PR completes. -->

## Test layers added or updated
- [ ] Unit
- [ ] Integration
- [ ] Contract
- [ ] Parity (cross-language)
- [ ] UI (Playwright)
- [ ] Migration (SQLite + PostgreSQL)
- [ ] Benchmark smoke
- [ ] Release pipeline

## Documentation updates
<!-- List every doc touched: README, architecture/*, ADR, plan, CHANGELOG. -->

## Release impact
<!-- One of: none / patch / minor / major / breaking. If non-trivial, attach the release-impact note from .github/RELEASE_IMPACT_TEMPLATE.md. -->

## Screenshots
<!-- For UI changes only. -->

## Reviewer checklist
- [ ] Conventional-commit title.
- [ ] DCO sign-off on every commit.
- [ ] All required CI jobs green.
- [ ] Tech Lead reviewed if architecture or contract change.
- [ ] Tech Writer reviewed if doc-only or doc-heavy.
- [ ] Security Engineer reviewed if auth, RBAC, dependency, or data-handling change.
